headline.purpose: Page titles and primary section headers.

body.purpose: Table cells, form content, toast text at 13px.

label.purpose: Column headers, badges, nav group labels.

mono.purpose: IDs, serial ranges, GSTINs, tabular quantities.

shadows.name: ds-2
shadows.purpose: Hover lift, toasts, active nav pills.

shadows.name: ds-focus
shadows.purpose: Focus-visible ring on all interactive elements.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Table row hover, button press, nav transitions.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Sheet open, route-level fades. Hard ceiling.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing. No bounce or elastic.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Single primary action per screen. Indigo fill, compact 32px height.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 32px; padding: 0 14px; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: #ffffff; background: var(--brand-accent, #4f46e5); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-hover, #4338ca); box-shadow: 0 4px 8px -2px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--brand-accent, #4f46e5) 28%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions, toolbar buttons, cancel actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 14px; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-primary, #18181b); background: transparent; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--surface-hover, #f1f1f3); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--brand-accent, #4f46e5) 28%, transparent); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Compact 36px form field for filters and detail forms.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-primary, #18181b); background: var(--surface-input, #ffffff); border: 1px solid var(--border-default, #d4d4d8); border-radius: 6px; transition: border 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--text-tertiary, #71717a) 70%, transparent); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: var(--border-strong, #a1a1aa); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--brand-accent, #4f46e5); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--brand-accent, #4f46e5) 28%, transparent); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Semantic status badge with leading dot. Soft tinted background.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 22px; padding: 0 8px; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--status-warning, #b45309); background: var(--status-warning-bg, #fef3c7); border-radius: 9999px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--status-warning, #b45309); flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Active sidebar navigation pill with accent icon.
components.html: Purchase requests
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--text-secondary, #52525b); text-decoration: none; border-radius: 9999px; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: var(--surface-hover, #f1f1f3); color: var(--text-primary, #18181b); } .ds-nav-item-active { font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-primary, #18181b); background: var(--surface-selected, #ebebee); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05); } .ds-nav-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; color: var(--text-secondary, #52525b); } .ds-nav-item-active .ds-nav-icon { color: var(--brand-accent, #4f46e5); }

components.name: Data Table Row
components.description: Primary list UI. Fast hover, subtle borders, mono IDs.
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; background: var(--surface-2, #ffffff); border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle, #e7e7ea); border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-table th { height: 40px; padding: 0 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-tertiary, #71717a); text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-default, #d4d4d8); background: var(--surface-1, #fafafa); } .ds-table td { height: 40px; padding: 8px; color: var(--text-primary, #18181b); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-subtle, #e7e7ea); transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-table tbody tr:hover td { background: var(--surface-hover, #f1f1f3); } .ds-table-mono { font-family: var(--font-geist-mono), ui-monospace, monospace; } .ds-table-num { text-align: right; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 22px; padding: 0 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--status-info, #1d4ed8); background: var(--status-info-bg, #dbeafe); border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-chip-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--status-info, #1d4ed8); }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Dashboard and detail page container with border-first elevation.
components.html:
Fulfillment

3 open disputes awaiting resolution.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; padding: 16px 0; background: var(--surface-2, #ffffff); border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle, #e7e7ea); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.05); font-family: var(--font-geist-sans), ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-header { padding: 0 16px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary, #18181b); letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-card-body { padding: 0 16px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary, #52525b); line-height: 1.4; }

narrative.overview: KNOT Procurement is a daily-use operations console, not a marketing surface. The visual system treats tables, filters, and detail pages as the primary canvas. Every choice serves repeat operators who spend hours moving records through approval, receipt, invoicing, and payment workflows. The aesthetic sits between Linear's interaction speed and Stripe's dashboard clarity: polished surfaces, restrained motion, and information density without clutter.
keyCharacteristics: Information-dense tables and list views as the default layout pattern
Indigo accent used sparingly for primary actions, active nav, links, and focus rings
Semantic color confined to status chips, alerts, and toasts
Geist Sans for UI copy; Geist Mono for IDs, serial ranges, and numeric columns
Fast micro-motion (120–180ms) with full prefers-reduced-motion support
Fixed 240px sidebar with role-colored left stripe; 1280px max content width

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Brand indigo appears on ≤10% of any screen: one primary CTA, active nav indicator, focus ring, or link cluster. Its rarity signals actionability.

rules.name: The Semantic-Only Rule
rules.body: Success, warning, error, and info colors appear in status chips, inline alerts, and toast left-bars only. Never as decorative backgrounds or body text outside badges.

rules.name: The Monospace ID Rule
rules.body: Every system identifier, serial range, and right-aligned quantity uses Geist Mono. If it could be copied into a spreadsheet, it is monospace.

rules.name: The 28px Ceiling Rule
rules.body: No operational screen uses type above 28px. This is a tool, not a landing page.

rules.name: The Border-First Rule
rules.body: Cards and tables use 1px --border-subtle borders at rest. Shadows signal interactivity or elevation, not decoration.

rules.name: The Glass Sparingly Rule
rules.body: surface-glass (16px backdrop blur) is reserved for sticky filter bars and drawer headers. Never as a default card treatment.

dos: Do use Geist Sans and Geist Mono as the only font families.
Do keep table hover transitions at 120ms for Linear-grade responsiveness.
Do render skeleton layouts matching real table column widths instead of spinners.
Do use dry, factual empty state copy without illustrations or emoji.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion by collapsing all durations to instant.
Do show a visible reason when a button is disabled.
Do limit each screen to one primary (indigo) button.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS marketing aesthetics: hero metrics with gradient accents, identical icon-card grids, cream/sand body backgrounds, tiny uppercase eyebrows on every section.
Don't use gradient text, gradient backgrounds as default, or glassmorphism for its own sake.
Don't add product tours, feature callouts, or tooltip overload on already-labeled controls.
Don't show Success! modals, emoji, exclamation marks, or illustrations in empty states.
Don't use centered page layouts or full-page loading spinners.
Don't use Inter or system-ui as the primary font, or sizes above 28px on operational screens.
Don't use generic placeholders or marketing buzzwords.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items.
Don't animate longer than 280ms or use bounce/elastic easing.
Don't put semantic status colors on table row backgrounds beyond hover/selected washes.
